name: Deer Alert PWA
description: Offline speech-controlled mapping PWA for deer sighting alerts with proximity detection

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><rect fill='%23dc2626' width='192' height='192'/><text x='50%' y='50%' font-size='80' font-weight='bold' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🦌</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><rect fill='%23dc2626' width='512' height='512'/><text x='50%' y='50%' font-size='250' font-weight='bold' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🦌</text></svg>

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 540 720'><rect fill='%23f5f5f5' width='540' height='720'/><text x='270' y='360' font-size='80' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🦌 Deer Alert</text></svg>
